objects.name: Apple Patches Everything, (Mon, May 11th)
objects.description: Apple today released its typical feature update across it&#;x26;#;39;s operating systems (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, vision OS). With this update, Apple patched 84 different vulnerabilities. Updates are available for the "26" series of operating systems, as well as for the previous "18" version of iOS/iPadOS, and two versions back for macOS (version 14 and 15).
